subcommands.name: allow
subcommands.description: Grants direnv to load the given .envrc

subcommands.name: deny
subcommands.description: Revokes the authorization of a given .envrc

subcommands.name: edit
subcommands.description: Opens PATH_TO_RC or the current .envrc into an $EDITOR and allow the file to be loaded afterwards

subcommands.name: exec
subcommands.description: Executes a command after loading the first .envrc found in DIR

subcommands.name: fetchurl
subcommands.description: Fetches a given URL into direnv's CAS

args.name: integrity-hash
args.description: Check if the `integrity hash` is equal to the hash value of the file obtained from the `url`

subcommands.name: help
subcommands.description: Help for direnv

subcommands.name: hook
subcommands.description: Used to setup the shell hook

subcommands.name: prune
subcommands.description: Removes old allowed files

subcommands.name: reload
subcommands.description: Triggers an env reload

subcommands.name: status
subcommands.description: Prints some debug status information

subcommands.name: stdlib
subcommands.description: Displays the stdlib available in the .envrc execution context

subcommands.name: version
subcommands.description: Prints the version or checks that direnv is older than VERSION_AT_LEAST

subcommands.name: apply_dump
subcommands.description: Accepts a filename containing `direnv dump` output and generates a series of bash export statements to apply the given env

subcommands.name: show_dump
subcommands.description: Show the data inside of a dump for debugging purposes

subcommands.name: dotenv
subcommands.description: Transforms a .env file to evaluatable `export KEY=PAIR` statements

subcommands.name: dump
subcommands.description: Used to export the inner bash state at the end of execution

subcommands.name: export
subcommands.description: Loads an .envrc and prints the diff in terms of exports

subcommands.name: watch
subcommands.description: Adds a path to the list that direnv watches for changes

subcommands.name: watch-dir
subcommands.description: Recursively adds a directory to the list that direnv watches for changes

subcommands.name: watch-list
subcommands.description: Pipe pairs of `mtime path` to stdin to build a list of files to watch

subcommands.name: current
subcommands.description: Reports whether direnv's view of a file is current (or stale)

options.name: --version
options.description: Prints the version or checks that direnv is older than VERSION_AT_LEAST
